description: Oracle NetSuite Token-Based Authentication (TBA), OAuth 2.0, SuiteScript red flags, and account/role mutation patterns. Applies to NetSuite ERP / SuiteCommerce.

token_patterns.name: NetSuite Account / Realm ID
token_patterns.notes: Account IDs are not strictly secret but reveal tenant + sandbox topology.

misconfigurations.title: Integration uses NLAuth (user/password) instead of TBA or OAuth 2.0
misconfigurations.rationale: NLAuth is deprecated and tied to a human's role; rotation breaks integrations and password leaks = full account access.
misconfigurations.fix: Migrate to TBA (Token-Based Auth) with a dedicated integration record and least-privilege role, or to OAuth 2.0 client-credentials.

misconfigurations.title: Integration record created without 'Token-Based Authentication' enabled
misconfigurations.rationale: Without TBA enabled, the integration must use the legacy NLAuth path.
misconfigurations.fix: Setup > Integration > Manage Integrations > New > tick 'Token-Based Authentication'.

misconfigurations.title: Administrator role users without 2FA enforced
misconfigurations.fix: Setup > Users/Roles > Two-Factor Authentication Roles — require 2FA for Administrator and any custom highly-privileged role.

misconfigurations.title: IP Address Rules disabled for the production account
misconfigurations.rationale: Lets a stolen TBA token be replayed from any source IP.
misconfigurations.fix: Setup > Company > Allowed IP Addresses — define an allowlist for production.

misconfigurations.title: SuiteScript code that `eval()`s a Custom Record string field
misconfigurations.rationale: Allows arbitrary JS execution in tenant context — recurring SuiteScript pitfall.
misconfigurations.fix: Never eval record fields; use a strict allow-list of operations and validated JSON.

admin_red_flags.title: New TBA Access Token created for a non-integration user role
admin_red_flags.rationale: Issuing TBA tokens to human-bound roles is an ATO persistence step.
admin_red_flags.signal: System notes: 'Access Token Created' on a User whose roles include Administrator / Full Access.

admin_red_flags.title: SuiteAnalytics / Saved Search export covering all customers by non-RevOps role
admin_red_flags.signal: Audit: saved_search_run with row count > 10k and target = Customer record.

admin_red_flags.title: Role permission added: 'Full' on 'Set Up Company' / 'Documents and Files'
admin_red_flags.signal: System notes: Role record updated with Permission line additions on sensitive permissions.

admin_red_flags.title: SuiteApp / Bundle installed in production
admin_red_flags.rationale: Bundles contain SuiteScript that runs with tenant privilege — supply-chain risk.
admin_red_flags.signal: System notes: Bundle Install events outside scheduled change windows.
